items.headline: BAL 2026 - Sahara Conference Day 2 Top 5 Plays
items.description: (5) Spinning between two defenders, Zachary Lofton goes up and under to find a wide open Omar Oraby who puts in an easy one-handed dunk. (4) Cheikh Diong finds an open lane at the baseline and throws down a sick reverse one-handed slam. (3) Ehab Saleh drives the lane, drawing multiple defenders, then throws up a perfect one-handed lob to Omar Oraby who throws down a two-handed dunk. (2) After the missed layup attempt from Jesse Jones JR, Drew Cisse comes in out of nowhere and electrifies the crowd with an insane putback dunk. (1) Omar Abada, with the clock ticking, drives the lane with hopes to tie the game. The defenders crash on the ball, clogging up the paint. Abada dishes it to a wide open Oussama Marnaoui just beyond the arch, who sinks in the 3 pointer with 5.5 seconds on the clock to take a 1 point lead against Al Ahly.
